title: Refactor: Extract method for code reuse
original_text: Refactored to extract method for code reuse. Extracted duplicate code into reusable methods. Added method for common operations. Implemented method parameterization. Improved code maintainability. Result: method extraction complete.

expected_body_lines: - Extract duplicate code into reusable methods
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(cleanup): extract method for code reuse"
